steps.t: The snow-beasts can be found to the east of Winter-home. Guard Kember wants you to bring some special Yule cheer to the snow-beasts of Frostbluff.
Awakened from a deep sleep by your cheers, the snow-beast has moved to a less noisy area. The beast seems to have no intention of leaving Frostbluff. …
The snow-beast has fallen back asleep. A bit more Yule cheer might drive him off.
Awakened from a deep sleep yet again, the beast has moved to a less noisy area. The beast still seems to have no intention of leaving Frostbluff. Perh…
The snow-beast has fallen asleep again. A bit more Yule cheer might drive him off.
The beast has moved to a less noisy area and is completely unmoved by your repeated attempts to drive him off. You should return to Guard Kember and e…
The beasts are no longer responding to your cheers. You should return to Guard Kember and ask him what to do next.
